query:
INSERT INTO repository (name, tree_state, treeclosed_src, treeclosed_reason)
        VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4)
        ON CONFLICT (name)
        DO UPDATE SET
          tree_state = EXCLUDED.tree_state,
          treeclosed_src = EXCLUDED.treeclosed_src,
          treeclosed_reason = EXCLUDED.treeclosed_reason
